channel.title: Lazy load images are load inconsistently
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
--> Hi there.
I have a problem with lazy load images loading inconsistently. Here is [my site](https://cmc-site.vulcanca.com/partners/). See the partner logos are not loading properly at first load. The images will show after we refresh the page again.
I render the page with this code: ``` <Content> <Html2React html={page.content.rendered} /> </Content> ```
Any help would be appreciated! Thanks

item.title: Lazy load images are load inconsistently
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @briyadi

When I visit the site I can see the logos, even on the first load - I do not need to refresh to see them.

Have you managed to resolve the issue? If not, and if you require more help, please provide a link to a repo. See here for the info that it would be useful for you to provide.

Read full topic
item.source: Lazy load images are load inconsistently

item.title: Lazy load images are load inconsistently
item.dc:creator: briyadi
item.description:
Hi there.

I have a problem with lazy load images loading inconsistently. Here is my site.
See the partner logos are not loading properly at first load. The images will show after we refresh the page again.

I render the page with this code:

<Content>
      <Html2React html={page.content.rendered} />
</Content>

Any help would be appreciated! Thanks

Read full topic
item.source: Lazy load images are load inconsistently
